hourly.summary: Arsenal fans are ecstatic after a dominant 4-1 victory over Tottenham in the North London Derby, with Viktor Gyökeres and Eberechi Eze both scoring twice. The win extends their lead at the top of the Premier League and has fans feeling confident about their title chances.

daily.summary: Arsenal fans experienced a dramatic emotional swing from deep frustration and anxiety about their team's tendency to drop points, to euphoric celebration after a dominant 4-1 derby victory over Tottenham. The win put them five points clear at the top and completely transformed the mood from exasperation to unbridled optimism.

weekly.summary: The overall vibe shows a declining trend from cautious optimism to growing frustration and anxiety. Starting with hopeful confidence about the title race and League Cup Final, sentiment steadily deteriorated following disappointing results and injury concerns, with fans increasingly worried about the team's mentality and ability to sustain their title challenge.
